name: Cougar Simulator: Big Cats
author: Poki
description: Cougar Simulator: Big Cats is a game where you live the life of a powerful cougar! Hunt for food, explore a massive open world of forests, farms, rivers, and fields, and build your own cougar family. Complete exciting quests, level up your stats, and unlock epic abilities as you survive and thrive in the wild. Encounter everything from farm animals to fierce predators like wolves and snakes. Customize your cougar with cool skins like panther or jaguar, and add magical effects to stand out. Ready to rule the wilderness and raise your legendary clan? How to play Cougar Simulator: Big Cats? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Speed Up: Shift Attack: left click Jump: the space bar Who created Cougar Simulator: Big Cats? Cougar Simulator: Big Cats is created by CyberGoldfinch. Play their other games on Poki: Archer Master 3D: Castle Defense , Deer Simulator , Dragon Simulator 3D , Panda Simulator 3D and Raccoon Adventure: City Simulator 3D ! How can I play Cougar Simulator: Big Cats for free? You can play Cougar Simulator: Big Cats for free on Poki. Can I play Cougar Simulator: Big Cats on mobile devices and desktop? Cougar Simulator: Big Cats can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
